name: coTfsEmcySendMessage
title: coTfsEmcySendMessage
syntax: long coTfsEmcySendMessage( dword nodeID, dword emcyCode, dword errorReg, byte inMsCodeBuf[5], dword msCodeBufSize );
description: This function sends out an emergency message.

parameters.name: nodeID
parameters.description: Node-ID of the node that is sender of the message.
